name: What Just Happened??! with Fred Savage
original_name: What Just Happened??! with Fred Savage
overview: A behind the scenes look at a half-hour hybrid comedy/talk aftershow dedicated to exploring the fandom surrounding “The Flare,” a fictional sci-fi thriller drama. A satire on the glut of aftershows and the big genre dramas they follow.

trailers.title: Fred Is Having Problems With Spoilers | Season 1 Ep. 2 | WHAT JUST HAPPENED??! WITH FRED SAVAGE
